title: LevelZ Bewitchment Compatibility (BewitchmentZ)
description: Adds compatibility between items & blocks from the Bewitchment mod and the level-gating feature from LevelZ.
body:
<sub>

[🌏Visit my website](https://khazoda.com)  

</sub>

# BewitchmentZ
This compatibility addon to the [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) mod adds level locks for some of Bewitchment's weapons and armour.

Unsurprisingly, you will need both [LevelZ](https://modrinth.com/mod/levelz) and [Bewitchment](https://modrinth.com/mod/bewitchment) to use this datapack/mod.

Feel free to modify the datapack to your liking by tweaking unlock values.
![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GqNYuGCU/images/ad07fca939ec3ef9cfcf4187104d5bc064713edf.png)

Also check out [Better Combat Bewitchment Compatibility](https://modrinth.com/mod/bcbc) to integrate the Bewitchment mod with Better Combat.
